title: Proclamation No. 419, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 419

RE-AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 31, SERIES OF 1917, ESTABLISHING PARCELS OF PUBLIC DOMAIN, SITUATED IN THE ISLANDS OF ALABAT AND POLILLO, PROVINCE OF TAYABAS, AS FOREST RESERVES.

Upon the recommendation of the Director of Forestry approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby re-amend Proclamation Numbered Thirty-one, dated July thirty-first, nineteen hundred and seventeen, by changing the boundaries of parcels I and II of Alabat Forest Reserve, situated in the municipalities of Alabat, Quezon, and Perez, Island of Alabat, Province of Tayabas, and described in the Bureau of Forestry map No. P. R.-7-1, to wit:
